mapper.sql: id, video_id, user_id, video_name, video_cover, category_id, p_category_id, post_type, tags, introduction, interaction, duration, play_count, like_count, coin_count, collect_count, comment_count, danmu_count, share_count, status, recommend_type, audit_reason, last_play_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mvp_video ( video_id, user_id, video_name, video_cover, category_id, p_category_id, post_type, tags, introduction, interaction, duration, play_count, like_count, coin_count, collect_count, comment_count, danmu_count, share_count, status, recommend_type, audit_reason, last_play_time, is_deleted, create_time ) VALUES ( #{videoId}, #{userId}, #{videoName}, #{videoCover}, #{categoryId}, #{pCategoryId}, #{postType}, #{tags}, #{introduction}, #{interaction}, #{duration}, #{playCount}, #{likeCount}, #{coinCount}, #{collectCount}, #{commentCount}, #{danmuCount}, #{shareCount}, #{status}, #{recommendType}, #{auditReason}, #{lastPlayTime}, 0, NOW() )

INSERT INTO mvp_video ( video_id, user_id, video_name, video_cover, category_id, p_category_id, post_type, tags, introduction, interaction, duration, play_count, like_count, coin_count, collect_count, comment_count, danmu_count, share_count, status, recommend_type, audit_reason, last_play_time, is_deleted, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.videoId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.videoName}, #{item.videoCover}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.pCategoryId}, #{item.postType}, #{item.tags}, #{item.introduction}, #{item.interaction}, #{item.duration}, #{item.playCount}, #{item.likeCount}, #{item.coinCount}, #{item.collectCount}, #{item.commentCount}, #{item.danmuCount}, #{item.shareCount}, #{item.status}, #{item.recommendType}, #{item.auditReason}, #{item.lastPlayTime}, 0, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE mvp_video SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mvp_video WHERE video_id = #{videoId} AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = 0)
SELECT FROM mvp_video WHERE (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = 0) ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) FROM mvp_video WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = 0)

SELECT COUNT(1) AS videoCount, COALESCE(SUM(play_count), 0) AS playCount, COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(SUM(coin_count), 0) AS coinCount, COALESCE(SUM(collect_count), 0) AS collectCount FROM mvp_video WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = 0)
